Easy Table: Smart Web Data Extractor
Extract, preview, and export HTML tables to Excel, CSV, PDF, or Images. Features smart auto-locate and local-first privacy.

Easy Table: Smart Web Data Extractor
Stop manual copy-pasting! Extract web tables to Excel, CSV, PDF, or Images in seconds with Easy Table.

Easy Table is a high-performance productivity tool designed for data analysts, researchers, and professionals. It automatically identifies HTML tables on any website and converts them into structured data ready for your workflow. Whether it’s financial reports, market research, or lead lists, Easy Table makes data extraction effortless.

🚀 Key Features
Smart Table Detection: Instantly identifies all table elements on a page with zero configuration.

Instant Data Preview: No more guessing. Click any table in the list to preview the first few rows of data directly in the popup before exporting.

Smart Hover & Locate: Simply hover your mouse over a table in the list, and the extension will automatically scroll to and highlight the corresponding table on the original webpage.

Multi-Format Export:

Excel (.xlsx) & CSV: Fully compatible with Microsoft Excel, Google Sheets, and Numbers.

PDF & PNG Image: High-quality exports perfect for presentations and offline reports.

Markdown & JSON: Developer-friendly formats for Notion, Obsidian, or coding projects.

📥 Universal Import: Now supports importing data from Clipboard, Excel (XLSX), and CSV directly into the editor for instant cleaning and formatting.

🎨 Refined UI Experience: Smarter table naming and enhanced preview with the first 5 records kept intact for context during editing.

🛠️ Polished PDF & PNG: Fixed the header duplication in PDF exports and resolved character encoding issues in PNG/Image exports.

📖 Enhanced Guidance: Redesigned Settings and Help pages for a smoother onboarding experience.

🔒 Privacy-First Design
Your data stays where it belongs: on your computer.

Local-First Processing: 100% of the extraction and conversion happens locally in your browser.

Zero Server Uploads: We never transmit your table content or personal browsing history to any external servers.

No Accounts Needed: Start extracting immediately without the need for sign-ups or logins.

Who is Easy Table for?
Data Analysts: Quickly grab raw data for cleaning and analysis.

Marketers: Collect competitor pricing, directory listings, or social stats.

Researchers: Gather academic data for thesis or institutional projects.

Sales Teams: Effortlessly build lead lists from web directories.

Stop wasting time on manual data entry. Experience the smartest way to grab web data with Easy Table today!

Paste clipboard data into Cloud ERP grids. Copy full tables across tabs. Shows next approver for PR and PO.

Cloud ERP Clipboard Helper
Boost your productivity in Cloud ERP environments with smart automation tools.

Cloud ERP Clipboard Helper is a lightweight browser extension designed to simplify data entry and improve workflow visibility for professional users of modern ERP systems. It acts as a bridge between your spreadsheet data and the ERP web interface, eliminating the need for tedious manual typing.

Key Features:
Smart Grid Paste: Copy data from Excel or any TSV source and paste it directly into ERP grids. The tool simulates human typing to ensure all native UI validations are triggered correctly.

Workflow Insights: Instantly view the "Next Approver" for Purchase Requisitions and Purchase Orders via intuitive tooltips, helping you track document flows without leaving the page.

Seamless Integration: Works entirely within your existing browser session using your current permissions.

Legal Disclaimer and Terms of Use
1. Nature of the Software
This extension is a client-side productivity enhancement tool. It is strictly a "UI Automation and Clipboard Helper." It does not perform direct database manipulations, does not bypass application logic, and does not serve as a data migration engine. It merely automates the manual process of entering data into standard browser-based input fields.

2. No Affiliation with IFS AB
This software is an independent, third-party development. It is NOT affiliated, associated, authorized, endorsed by, or in any way officially connected with IFS AB, or any of its subsidiaries or affiliates. The name "IFS," "IFS Cloud," and related marks are registered trademarks of IFS AB.

3. Compliance and Security
The Tool is designed for licensed users with legitimate access to their ERP environment. It respects all existing security protocols and permissions. Users are responsible for ensuring compliance with their organization’s internal policies and their Software License Agreement with the ERP provider.

4. Data Integrity and Liability
The Tool provides functionality on an "as-is" basis. The developer makes no warranties regarding the accuracy or completeness of the data processed.

User Responsibility: The user remains solely responsible for verifying the accuracy of any data entered.

No Liability: In no event shall the developer be liable for any direct, indirect, or consequential damages (including loss of data or downtime) arising out of the use of this extension.

5. Non-Circumvention
This Tool does not circumvent any license restrictions, user seat limitations, or module-based paywalls. It operates entirely within the scope of the user's active and authorized browser session.

6. Intellectual Property
All original code and logic within this extension are the intellectual property of the developer. No proprietary source code or official assets from the ERP vendor have been used or redistributed.
Convert Markdown to Lark Docs with diagram support

MD to Lark Docs — Convert Markdown to Lark Documents

Seamlessly import Markdown (.md) files into your Lark (Feishu) documents with one click.

✨ Key Features:
• Upload .md files or paste Markdown directly
• Automatic diagram rendering (Mermaid & PlantUML → images)
• External image embedding (converts to inline data URIs)
• Live preview before inserting
• Smart paste injection into Lark's editor
• Auto-set document title from first heading
• Dark mode & light mode support
• Multi-language: English, Tiếng Việt, 中文

📋 How to use:
1. Open any Lark document (larksuite.com, feishu.cn)
2. Click the extension icon in the toolbar
3. Upload a .md file or paste Markdown content
4. Click "Preview" to check, or "Convert" to insert directly

⚡ Supported content:
• Headings, bold, italic, strikethrough
• Code blocks with syntax highlighting
• Tables, task lists, blockquotes
• Images (auto-embedded as data URIs)
• Mermaid & PlantUML diagrams
• Horizontal rules, links

🔒 Privacy:
• No data is collected or sent to external servers
• All processing happens locally in your browser
• Only activates on Lark/Feishu domains

⭐ Open Source: https://github.com/riki449/chrome-ext-lark-md-to-docs
A Chrome extension to prevent class duplication when pasting in Webflow.

Traditional Webflow component copying can break styles or require cleanup. Pagifye Extension eliminates that friction—making component reuse effortless, clean, and scalable. Whether you’re building from scratch or iterating on an existing site, this tool ensures visual and structural consistency. 

The Pagifye Chrome Extension is your ultimate Webflow design accelerator. Instantly copy high-quality Pagifye components directly into your Webflow projects—without breaking styles, duplicating class names, or losing design consistency. Whether you're working with dark or light themes, the extension ensures seamless integration, saving you hours of manual styling and rework. Built specifically for creators and developers who rely on Pagifye as their component library or web design companion, this tool helps you move faster, stay organized, and focus on what truly matters—creating amazing websites.

Ideal For:
Freelancers & Agencies who want to accelerate Webflow development without sacrificing quality or consistency.

Designers building their own scalable component libraries or style systems inside Webflow.

Founders & Entrepreneurs looking to launch professional, high-conversion websites quickly and efficiently using Webflow—without the usual design or technical bottlenecks.

Download Pinterest videos easily with one click via Pinget

Pinterest Video Downloader - Pinget makes it easy to download videos and images from Pinterest in just one click.
The extension automatically adds a “Download” button to every post on Pinterest, allowing users to quickly save content without leaving the site.
When clicked, the button retrieves the original post link and opens the Pinget (pinsave.onl) service to generate a direct download link.

✅ Main Features:
• Add a visible “Download” button on each Pinterest post.
• One-click link copying and automatic redirection to the download page.
• Works with videos, GIFs, and images.
• Clean, lightweight, and secure — no data collection or background tracking.

🔒 Privacy & Security:
This extension only uses clipboard access to copy and read Pinterest post links that the user interacts with.
No user data, browsing history, or personal information is collected or shared.

Simplify your Pinterest experience — download your favorite videos and images instantly with Pinget!
Ingrains the CHC Editor into the page for easier editing and additional security controls shown on your Certificate.

The Human Creative Platform is open to Early Access. To create an account, apply for an Early Access Code at https://shorturl.at/jJ9UP

Human Creative exists to preserve trust and human originality in various written and artistic forms by monitoring the process of human creation and certifying its productions. We believe that human ingenuity is categorically different from generative-AI because it involves intentionality and thus deserves to be set apart. The era of widespread generative-AI adoption is also a time of deepfakes, political instability, and mistrust of institutions across society. We know that credibility is an essential foundation for business, education, and creative arts, and our aim is to restore and protect credibility at every level in which it is needed.

This extension adds an additional layer of security for Certifying Human Content and interfaces our editor with most websites.

Four-Fold Security:
Prevent: We prevent the use of generative-AI by requiring content to be produced within our system and by blocking common generative-AI sources. Additionally, we link other devices and offer a “phone-lock” feature which offers additional assurance that a user was not “cheating” by utilizing another device.
Deter: We deter the use of generative-AI by auditing pasted content and actively scanning written content for common generative-AI words, phrases, and structure.
Monitor: We monitor the entire creative process for signs of human originality (cursor behavior, paragraph restructuring) and for our human auditors (an additional verification process) to review should that be necessary for a particularly complicated document.
Promote: We promote human originality by making the use of generative-AI a personal hassle. It is difficult to utilize our system while bouncing around on multiple devices, browsers, and especially while trying to sneak-in generative-AI. We promote human originality by refusing to certify trope generative-AI phraseology, and by prohibiting or making difficult behaviors which might allow AI to be secretly snuck-in.

Clearing House:
We serve as a clearing house for other forms of certification. If you are an AI-detection company, partner with us to use our seal system. If your AI-detection services match our quality standards, you can utilize our Certified Human Creative seal and QR system. We are actively seeking partner organizations doing this important work in graphic design, physical artwork, music, and video.

Smart Clip - Clipboard History and Manager

Never lose copied text again.

Smart Clip is a fast, lightweight, and privacy-first clipboard history manager for Chrome.
It…

Never lose copied text again.

Smart Clip is a fast, lightweight, and privacy-first clipboard history manager for Chrome.
It automatically saves everything you copy and lets you quickly reuse, pin, search, and manage your clipboard history — all from a clean, simple popup.

No sign-ups. No cloud sync. No distractions.
Your clipboard history stays local, secure, and always available when you need it.

🚀 Why Smart Clip?

If you copy and paste throughout the day — links, notes, code snippets, messages, research, or repetitive replies — losing clipboard content can be frustrating and time-consuming.

Smart Clip solves this by quietly keeping a history of what you copy, so you can focus on your work instead of worrying about losing important text.

✨ Key Features
📋 Automatic Clipboard History

Smart Clip automatically saves copied text in the background.
Once installed, it works instantly — no setup required.

⚡ One-Click Copy

Reuse any previously copied item with a single click.
No need to retype or search for lost content.

📌 Pin Important Items

Pin frequently used clips to keep them easily accessible at the top of your list.
Perfect for email templates, code snippets, links, or notes you reuse often.

🗂 Bulk Actions

Select multiple clipboard items at once and:

Copy them together

Pin or unpin in bulk

Delete multiple items quickly

Designed for speed and efficiency.

🔍 Search Clipboard History

Find copied text instantly using the built-in search.
Even long or old clipboard entries are easy to locate.

⏸ Pause Clipboard Tracking

Need privacy temporarily?
Pause clipboard tracking with one click and resume whenever you’re ready.

🌙 Dark Mode Support

Switch between light and dark mode for comfortable viewing during night sessions or extended work hours.

🧹 Clear Clipboard History

Clear your entire clipboard history anytime to stay organized and clutter-free.

🔒 Privacy-First by Design

Your privacy is a core principle of Smart Clip.

Works 100% locally

No accounts or sign-ups

No analytics or tracking

No cloud storage

Clipboard data never leaves your device

What you copy stays private — always.

💼 Who Is Smart Clip For?

Smart Clip is ideal for anyone who copies and pastes frequently, including:

Writers & content creators ✍️
Reuse drafts, notes, and ideas effortlessly.

Developers & engineers 💻
Manage code snippets, commands, and logs efficiently.

Students & researchers 📚
Collect quotes, references, and study notes without losing anything.

Customer support & sales teams 💬
Quickly reuse responses and templates.

Everyday users
Anyone who wants a safer, smarter clipboard.

🧠 Designed for Productivity

Smart Clip focuses on:

A clean, distraction-free interface

Fast access with minimal clicks

Stable layout with fixed action buttons

Smooth scrolling and predictable behavior

Lightweight performance that doesn’t slow your browser

Everything is designed to help you work faster and stay organized.

⚙️ Simple & Lightweight

Runs quietly in the background

Minimal memory usage

No unnecessary permissions

No performance impact on browsing

Just install and use.

🔐 Permissions Explanation

Smart Clip uses permissions only to:

Store clipboard history locally

Detect copied text

Provide quick access and functionality

No data is collected, shared, or transmitted externally.

Descarga vídeos de Pinterest fácilmente con un solo clic usando Descargarpin.

Descargar videos de Pinterest es una extensión gratuita y sencilla que te permite guardar cualquier video o imagen de Pinterest con solo un clic. Está diseñada para ofrecerte una experiencia rápida, segura y sin complicaciones al descargar el contenido que más te inspira.

Pinterest es una de las plataformas más populares del mundo para descubrir ideas, inspiración y creatividad visual. Sin embargo, muchos usuarios se encuentran con la limitación de no poder guardar los videos directamente en sus dispositivos. Con Descargar videos de Pinterest, este problema desaparece. Ahora puedes descargar cualquier video o imagen de Pinterest en calidad HD, sin marca de agua y sin necesidad de copiar enlaces manualmente.

🌟 Características principales

Descarga instantánea con un solo clic
Una vez instalada la extensión, aparecerá un botón “Descargar” sobre cada pin o video. Solo tienes que hacer clic y el contenido se descargará o se abrirá automáticamente en la página de descarga. No necesitas herramientas externas ni pasos complicados.

Compatible con todos los tipos de contenido
Funciona tanto para videos, GIFs como para imágenes de alta resolución. Puedes guardar recetas, tutoriales, ideas de decoración, moda o cualquier contenido visual que te guste directamente en tu ordenador o teléfono.

Sin marca de agua y con la mejor calidad disponible
Los archivos se descargan en su resolución original, tal como fueron subidos a Pinterest, para que puedas disfrutar del mejor detalle y nitidez.

Funciona en todas las plataformas
Descargar videos de Pinterest es totalmente compatible con Windows, macOS, Linux, Android y iOS (a través del navegador Chrome). No necesitas ninguna aplicación adicional.

Interfaz limpia, ligera y fácil de usar
La extensión se integra perfectamente en la interfaz de Pinterest sin ralentizar tu navegación. No contiene publicidad molesta ni ventanas emergentes.

Automatización inteligente
Al abrir un pin específico, la extensión detecta automáticamente el enlace y lo prepara para su descarga. Si utilizas nuestro servicio web asociado, el enlace se completa y procesa de forma automática.

Privacidad garantizada
Descargar videos de Pinterest no recopila ni comparte datos personales. Todo el proceso de descarga ocurre directamente entre Pinterest y tu navegador, sin intermediarios ni seguimiento.

💡 Cómo usar la extensión

Instala la extensión desde Chrome Web Store.

Abre Pinterest y navega hasta el video o imagen que quieras guardar.

Verás un nuevo botón “Descargar” en la esquina superior del pin.

Haz clic en el botón y el video se abrirá automáticamente en una página segura donde podrás descargarlo en calidad HD.

¡Listo! El archivo se guardará en tu dispositivo para que puedas verlo o compartirlo cuando quieras.

🚀 Ventajas frente a otras herramientas

No necesitas copiar y pegar enlaces manualmente.

No requiere registro ni inicio de sesión.

Totalmente gratuita y sin límites de descarga.

100% segura: no contiene malware ni publicidad invasiva.

Compatible con cualquier versión de Chrome basada en Chromium (incluido Edge, Brave y Opera).

Optimizada para velocidad y facilidad de uso.

A diferencia de otras páginas o aplicaciones de descarga, esta extensión funciona directamente dentro de Pinterest, lo que hace que la experiencia sea fluida, natural y sin interrupciones.

🎯 Ideal para

Creadores de contenido que buscan guardar videos de inspiración para editar o reutilizar.

Diseñadores, fotógrafos o arquitectos que coleccionan referencias visuales.

Usuarios curiosos que quieren conservar ideas de decoración, moda, recetas o manualidades.

Profesores o estudiantes que necesitan guardar material educativo o visual.

Con Descargar videos de Pinterest, puedes construir tu propia biblioteca visual de ideas sin depender de la conexión a Internet.

🧭 Compatibilidad

Sitio compatible: Pinterest.com

Navegadores compatibles: Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, Brave, Opera (basados en Chromium).

Sistemas operativos: Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS.

No necesitas extensiones adicionales ni configuraciones especiales. Solo instálala, abre Pinterest y empieza a descargar.

🔐 Seguridad y privacidad

Tu privacidad es nuestra prioridad. Esta extensión:

No rastrea tu actividad de navegación.

No almacena contraseñas, datos personales ni historial.

No se comunica con servidores externos más allá del proceso necesario para generar el enlace de descarga.

Cumple con las políticas de seguridad y privacidad de Chrome Web Store.

Cada descarga ocurre de manera local, directamente desde tu navegador.

🌍 Idiomas disponibles

Actualmente la extensión está disponible en español, pero también puede usarse sin problemas en cualquier idioma gracias a su interfaz visual simple e intuitiva.

🧠 Consejos de uso

Si un video no se descarga correctamente, abre el pin en una nueva pestaña y presiona el botón “Descargar” nuevamente.

Asegúrate de tener una buena conexión a Internet para evitar interrupciones.

Puedes usar la extensión junto con nuestro sitio web asociado para gestionar las descargas de forma más rápida.

❤️ Por qué elegir Descargar videos de Pinterest

Esta extensión fue creada con el objetivo de simplificar tu experiencia en Pinterest. Queremos que puedas disfrutar, inspirarte y guardar lo que te gusta sin obstáculos.

Miles de usuarios utilizan herramientas similares cada día, pero pocas ofrecen una experiencia tan limpia, rápida y segura. Con Descargar videos de Pinterest, obtienes una herramienta confiable, gratuita y sin publicidad.

Descarga tus videos favoritos, compártelos con tus amigos, inspírate para tus proyectos y guarda tus ideas sin límites.

GPT分享助手：一键复制免翻链接
解决 ChatGPT 的分享链接，发送给你朋友时无法访问的问题，得到一个免翻网址，所见即所得，特别好用

GPT 免翻分享助手是一款专门为解决 ChatGPT 分享链接访问遇阻问题而设计的浏览器插件。这款插件的核心功能是为用户提供一个免翻网址，即使在无法直接访问 openai.com 的环境下（例如中国大陆）也能无缝访问和分享您的 ChatGPT 对话。

GPT 免翻分享助手的设计理念是简单易用。一旦安装此插件，用户可以直接在 ChatGPT 的网页版弹窗上进行操作。您无需在多个页面之间切换或进行复杂设置，只需一键点击，即可生成可分享的免翻网址。

使用 GPT 免翻分享助手，不仅可以轻松分享您的 ChatGPT 对话，而且无需担心您的朋友因无法访问网站而错过精彩内容。它为全球范围内的 ChatGPT 用户提供了一种便利的解决方案，使分享和协作变得无比简单。

尽享 ChatGPT 的全球智能对话体验，全面解决跨境分享问题，就在 GPT 免翻分享助手！我们希望通过我们的插件，让每个人都能无缝连接至 ChatGPT，无论他们身处何方。安装 GPT 免翻分享助手，让分享变得更轻松，对话更无障碍。
